title: FTSIO
description: Actually Optimizing Minecraft for the newer versions (1.21.1+)
body:
Something has been up with Fabulously Optimized for newer versions, so I made this! This modpack contains simple optimization mods, alongside some tweaks and QOL mods I recommend other use :D

**No hate towards the Fabulously Optimized team/creator(s), I use their modpack constantly.**
